args.subject: Action required: Coordinate initial development phase — Due 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

Please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project as listed in the Team Meeting Minutes. Specifically, organize and confirm the development kickoff activities, confirm required resources and team members, ensure the initial tasks align with the agreed project timeline and milestones, and report back with the confirmed start date and any blockers.

Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please reply to confirm when this is scheduled and share any relevant notes or meeting invites.

Best,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Send meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to John Mitchell — Due 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Please email the file "meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx" to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review, as recorded in the Team Meeting Minutes. Ensure the attachment is included and add a brief note asking for any feedback or required changes. Confirm that John received the file and summarize any responses.

Deadline: 2024-05-21.

Please reply when the email has been sent and include a copy of the sent message or confirmation.

Best,
Emma Johnson

args.subject: Action required: Review sales projections and provide feedback — Due 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Please review the sales projections and provide your feedback as noted in the Team Meeting Minutes. Specifically, examine the projections for accuracy, highlight any concerns or recommended adjustments, and provide written feedback or annotated documents with suggested changes.

Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Please reply with your feedback or with the date you will deliver the review if you need more time.

Best,
Emma Johnson
